title: Successful email/password login redirects to dashboard
description: Verifies that a user can log in with valid credentials and is redirected to the dashboard.

title: Invalid password shows visible error message
description: Verifies that invalid credentials do not log the user in and an error message is shown.

title: Empty email and password blocks login
description: Verifies that submitting the login form with empty required fields prevents login and shows a visible validation message.

title: Password-only submission shows validation for missing email
description: Verifies that the login form requires an email when attempting to submit with only a password filled.

title: Email-only submission shows validation for missing password
description: Verifies that the login form requires a password when attempting to submit with only an email filled.

title: Invalid email format is rejected before login attempt
description: Verifies that an obviously invalid email format triggers a visible validation message and does not redirect.

title: Login page renders core controls
description: Verifies that the login page displays the email field, password field, and submit button so the user can attempt sign-in.

title: View food handling course landing page core content and pricing tiers
description: Verifies the landing page renders course features, certification info, and all three tiered pricing options.

title: CTA from course landing page initiates checkout navigation (via click)
description: Verifies that clicking a primary call-to-action from the course landing page routes the user into the checkout experience.

title: Tier selection affects the checkout quantity context (small tier)
description: Verifies that choosing the 1-3 people tier and then using the CTA takes the user to checkout with small-tier context visible.

title: Tier selection affects the checkout quantity context (mid tier)
description: Verifies that choosing the 4-9 people tier and then using the CTA takes the user to checkout with quantity controls visible.

title: Tier selection affects the checkout quantity context (10+ tier)
description: Verifies that choosing the 10+ people tier and then using the CTA takes the user to checkout with quantity controls visible.

title: Landing page contains certification/benefits section below the fold
description: Verifies that the page provides additional course benefits and certification details when the user scrolls.

steps.description: Scroll to the bottom of the page

title: Sanitation plan landing page loads and shows core service description/compliance messaging
description: Verifies the sanitation plan landing page renders and displays the main service description and legal/compliance information.

title: Supported establishment types section is visible on the landing page
description: Verifies users can find and view the supported establishment types on the sanitation plan landing page.

steps.description: Scroll to the section describing supported establishment types

title: Six sanitation modules section is visible and appears complete
description: Verifies the landing page shows a section describing the sanitation modules and that multiple module items are visible.

steps.description: Scroll to the section that lists the sanitation modules

title: Login then reach sanitation plan generation page from landing CTA
description: Verifies a user can log in and then access the sanitation plan generation page after clicking the CTA.

steps.description: Click on "Plan de saneamiento" in the site navigation

title: Login then navigate directly to sanitation generation page (access is granted post-login)
description: Verifies that after logging in, the sanitation generation page can be opened successfully.

steps.description: Click on "Generate sanitation plan" from any visible dashboard/home CTA

title: Checkout page loads and shows product summary and pricing
description: Verifies that the checkout page for manipulacion-alimentos loads and displays the product summary with pricing information.

title: Adjust quantity using + and - updates total price
description: Verifies that increasing and decreasing quantity updates the total price in real time.

steps.description: Verify text "2" is visible in the quantity value
Verify text "1" is visible in the quantity value

title: Apply valid discount code updates total and shows discount applied
description: Verifies that applying a valid discount code results in a visible applied state and a changed total price.

steps.description: Type "DESCUENTO10" into the discount code field

title: Remove applied discount code returns checkout to non-discount state
description: Verifies that a previously applied discount can be removed and the discount indicator is no longer shown.

steps.description: Type "DESCUENTO10" into the discount code field

title: Invalid discount code shows validation error
description: Verifies that an invalid discount code displays a visible validation error message.

steps.description: Type "CODIGO_INVALIDO_123" into the discount code field

title: Discount code apply with empty input shows required/invalid message
description: Verifies that clicking apply with an empty discount code input shows a visible validation message.

title: Payment success page shows confirmation and transaction reference number
description: Verifies the success page displays a visible transaction reference number for a completed payment.

steps.description: Verify element "Transaction reference number" is visible

title: From payment success page, user can navigate to buyer dashboard
description: Verifies the call-to-action on the success page takes the user to the dashboard.

steps.description: Verify element "Go to dashboard" is visible

title: Payment success page handles missing transaction reference with a clear notice
description: Verifies the success page displays a support/pending-verification notice when the transaction reference is missing.

title: Payment success page shows pending verification message when reference is not available
description: Verifies the success page indicates verification is pending when the transaction reference cannot be displayed.

title: Payment success page remains usable after refresh (confirmation content still visible)
description: Verifies that reloading the success page still shows confirmation content and does not appear broken.

title: Payment success page provides a visible dashboard navigation control even when reference is missing
description: Verifies the dashboard navigation button is visible and actionable in the missing-reference scenario.

steps.description: Verify element "Go to dashboard" is visible

title: Payment success page does not expose unrelated payment provider messaging
description: Verifies the success page does not show Stripe-related confirmation language since Wompi is the active provider.

title: Login and load Buyer Dashboard with core sections visible
description: Verifies an authenticated buyer can log in and see key dashboard sections (students, quota, sanitation plans, pending orders).

title: Search students by email from Buyer Dashboard
description: Verifies the student list can be filtered using an email query and the filtered results are shown.

steps.description: Type "test" into the student search field

title: Open new student registration form from Buyer Dashboard
description: Verifies the buyer can open the register-student flow and see required form fields.

title: Register a new student successfully and see it in the list
description: Verifies a buyer can submit the registration form with valid details and see the new student appear in the student list.

steps.description: Type "E2E Student" into the name field

title: Registration validation: required fields prevent submission
description: Verifies the registration form shows validation when submitting with missing required fields.

title: View sanitation plans section on Buyer Dashboard
description: Verifies sanitation plans are visible with expected summary fields (business name, status, code).

title: Quota usage is displayed on Buyer Dashboard
description: Verifies quota usage is shown (total/used slots) for the buyer.

title: Pending orders list is visible on Buyer Dashboard
description: Verifies the buyer can see the pending orders section and it renders without errors.

steps.description: Verify element "Pending orders list" is visible

title: Authenticated student can open course learn page and see the video player and playlist
description: Verifies that an authenticated student can reach the course learning page and see the core UI (player and playlist).

title: Switching modules from the sidebar updates the active video module
description: Verifies that clicking a different module in the playlist switches the currently displayed video module.

steps.description: Click on a different video item in the playlist sidebar

title: After switching modules, the video description updates below the player
description: Verifies that the description content below the video player changes after selecting another module in the playlist.

steps.description: Click on a different video item in the playlist sidebar

title: Playlist sidebar allows browsing and selecting an item further down the list
description: Verifies that the user can scroll the playlist sidebar and select a module that is not initially visible.

steps.description: Scroll to the bottom of the playlist sidebar
Click on a video item near the bottom of the playlist sidebar

title: Selected module remains visible as the active item in the playlist
description: Verifies that after selecting a module, the UI indicates which playlist item is currently active.

steps.description: Click on a different video item in the playlist sidebar
Verify element "active/selected playlist item indicator" is visible

title: Start exam from instructions and complete to results screen
description: Verifies an authenticated student can start the exam, answer questions, submit, and see the results summary.

title: Navigate through questions using Siguiente and submit on last question
description: Verifies the student can select answers, move to the next question, and submit the exam from the last question.

steps.description: Select an answer option for the current multiple-choice question

title: Submit exam and verify results fields are shown (pass/fail, percentage, correct/total)
description: Verifies that after submitting the exam, the results screen shows pass/fail plus score percentage and correct/total values.

title: Fail path: Reintentar examen is available after failing
description: Verifies that if the student fails, the results screen offers a retry action and returns the user to the exam start state.

steps.description: Click "Reintentar examen" if it is visible on the results screen

title: Time limit expiry auto-submits and shows results
description: Verifies that when the time limit expires during an active exam, the system auto-submits and shows the results screen.

steps.description: Wait for the exam time limit to expire and for the results screen to appear

title: Attempt to submit immediately after starting shows validation or prevents submit
description: Verifies the exam prevents submitting without completing required questions or shows a visible validation message.

title: Course completion status is visible on Course Content page
description: Verifies the course completion/passing status area is visible to support certificate eligibility clarity.

steps.description: Verify element "course completion status" is visible
Verify text indicating progress or completion status is visible

title: Course Content page handles slow certificate availability check gracefully
description: Verifies the page shows a visible loading/processing state while determining certificate availability.

steps.description: Verify element indicating loading or checking status is visible

title: Generate an AI sanitation plan successfully and view the 6-module output
description: Verifies an authenticated user can submit valid business details, wait for generation, and see the full sanitation plan with all compliance modules.

steps.description: Fill "Panadería La Esperanza" into the business name field
Select "Panadería" from the business type dropdown
Fill "Calle 10 # 20-30, Bogotá" into the address field
Fill "María Pérez" into the legal representative field
Wait for the generation result section to appear

title: Attempt to submit sanitation plan form with missing required fields and see validation messages
description: Verifies client-side/server-side validation prevents generation and displays visible prompts for required fields.

steps.description: Fill "" into the business name field

title: Validation clears after correcting missing fields and resubmitting
description: Verifies validation errors disappear after filling required inputs and the generation proceeds to results.

steps.description: Fill "Cafetería Central" into the business name field
Select "Cafetería" from the business type dropdown
Fill "Avenida 1 # 2-03, Cali" into the address field
Fill "Laura Martínez" into the legal representative field
Wait for the generation result section to appear

title: Handle AI generation failure message and retry generation
description: Verifies that if the generation fails, a visible failure message appears and the user can retry from the UI.

steps.description: Fill "Carnicería Los Andes" into the business name field
Select "Carnicería" from the business type dropdown
Fill "Transversal 15 # 8-90, Bucaramanga" into the address field
Fill "Carlos Ruiz" into the legal representative field
Wait for the generation to finish or fail message to appear
Wait for the generation result section to appear

title: Generation shows a visible loading/in-progress state while waiting
description: Verifies the UI indicates generation is in progress (loading text/spinner) after submission and before results.

steps.description: Fill "Minimercado San José" into the business name field
Select "Tienda" from the business type dropdown
Fill "Calle 33 # 12-55, Barranquilla" into the address field
Fill "Sofía López" into the legal representative field
Wait for the generation result section to appear

title: Verify page loads and shows QR verification options
description: Ensures the public verification page is reachable and presents camera and image-upload options to the user.

title: Image upload tab shows upload controls and instructions
description: Verifies the image-upload verification path is discoverable and provides a clear way to provide a QR image.

title: Submit verification without providing an image shows validation error
description: Ensures the system prevents verification when no QR image is provided and displays a helpful message.

title: Scan history area is visible on the verification page
description: Checks that the page presents a visible scan history section to the user.

steps.description: Verify element "scan history list" is visible

title: Admin can access /admin and see KPI stats cards
description: Verifies an authenticated user can load the Admin Dashboard and view the KPI stats cards.

steps.description: Click on the "Admin" link in the navigation menu

title: Admin Dashboard stats cards display all required KPI labels
description: Verifies the Admin Dashboard shows all expected KPI stat labels for quick monitoring.

steps.description: Click on the "Admin" link in the navigation menu

title: Admin Dashboard shows plans generated KPI label
description: Verifies the Admin Dashboard includes the plans generated KPI label in the stats area.

steps.description: Click on the "Admin" link in the navigation menu

title: Admin Dashboard displays the 7-day sales chart section
description: Verifies the Admin Dashboard renders the 7-day sales chart area for recent performance tracking.

steps.description: Click on the "Admin" link in the navigation menu

title: Admin Dashboard shows recent notifications section
description: Verifies the Admin Dashboard includes a visible notifications area for recent events.

steps.description: Click on the "Admin" link in the navigation menu

title: Admin Dashboard notifications include recognizable event types when present
description: Verifies that the notifications area can display common event categories such as payments, exam results, and plan generations.

steps.description: Click on the "Admin" link in the navigation menu

title: Admin Dashboard loads without visible error state
description: Verifies that the Admin Dashboard does not show an error message on initial load (basic resilience check).

steps.description: Click on the "Admin" link in the navigation menu
Verify text "Something went wrong" is not visible

title: Non-admin user is denied access to Admin Dashboard after login
description: Verifies a logged-in user without admin permissions cannot access /admin and sees a denial message or is redirected away.

title: Admin can view Users page with user management table columns
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can open Admin Users and see the user table with expected column information visible.

title: Admin can search/filter users and see results update
description: Verifies search/filter functionality narrows the visible rows in the admin user table.

steps.description: Type "test" into the user search field

title: Admin opens user actions and sees edit/disable options
description: Verifies that user action controls are available per user row and present edit/disable actions.

steps.description: Click on the first row "Actions" button

title: Admin changes a user role and saves; updated role is shown in the table
description: Verifies an admin can edit a user, change role, save, and see the updated role reflected in the user row.

steps.description: Click on the first row "Actions" button

title: Admin disables a user and saves; status changes to disabled/inactive
description: Verifies an admin can disable a user account and see the status update in the table.

steps.description: Click on the first row "Actions" button

title: Canceling out of edit leaves the user row unchanged
description: Verifies leaving the edit form without saving does not change role/status values shown in the user row.

steps.description: Click on the first row "Actions" button

title: Admin can view the payments transactions table
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can load the Admin Payments page and see the transactions table with expected columns.

title: Filter payments by APPROVED status
description: Verifies the status filter can be set to APPROVED and the table updates to show approved transactions.

title: Filter payments by PENDING status
description: Verifies the status filter can be set to PENDING and the table updates accordingly.

title: Filter payments by DECLINED status
description: Verifies the status filter can be set to DECLINED and the table updates accordingly.

title: Open a payment row to view Wompi transaction ID and details
description: Verifies an admin can click a transaction row and see the Wompi transaction ID/details for that payment.

steps.description: Click the first payment row in the payments table

title: No-results empty state after filtering
description: Verifies that when a filter produces no matching transactions, an empty-state message with guidance is shown.

title: Switching filters updates results without leaving the page
description: Verifies an admin can switch between status filters and the UI remains functional, showing the new filter state.

title: Admin can open sanitation plans grid and see plan cards
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can access the sanitation plans page and see plan cards with key summary fields.

steps.description: Click on "Sanitation" in the admin navigation

title: Sanitation plan cards display required summary information
description: Verifies the plans grid shows the expected fields on at least one plan card (business name, establishment type, owner, date).

steps.description: Click on "Sanitation" in the admin navigation

title: Admin opens public verification details from a plan card verification link
description: Verifies clicking a plan card's verification link navigates to a public verification details page.

steps.description: Click on "Sanitation" in the admin navigation
Click on the "Verification" link on the first visible plan card

title: Public verification details page shows plan details after opening from admin
description: Verifies the public verification page reached from admin displays identifiable plan details (not an empty page).

steps.description: Click on "Sanitation" in the admin navigation
Click on the "Verification" link on the first visible plan card
